full_text:
Quan Wei
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Wei. Quan Duan’s son. Aided Zhuge Dan’s rebellion, but had to surrender. Quan Wei was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
